channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-10
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates in both the `scienceverse/metacheck` and `JamieCummins/regcheck` projects. In `metacheck`, Lakens improved the cache and data handling, preserving original data and refining the folder structure, laying a solid foundation for future development. Meanwhile, in `regcheck`, significant work was done on the staging branch, introducing "registered report mode" and advancing through multiple phases of development, although some changes were later refined to avoid over-complication. These projects demonstrate the power of iterative development and community collaboration, and we celebrate the efforts of our contributors, including Lakens and JamieCummins, in driving progress forward. As our projects continue to evolve, we look forward to exploring potential connections and synergies between `metacheck` and `regcheck`, and discovering new opportunities for growth and innovation.

38 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

metacheck16 commits
docpluck12 commits
regcheck10 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed, specifically merging the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch from the GitHub repository `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` into itself. The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", as stated in the commit message. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages, indicating that all recent work was focused on `feature-non-apa-newer`. The merge commit suggests that changes from the remote repository were incorporated into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. The nature of the "admin updates" is not specified beyond the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The first phase of development involved adding "registered report mode", as indicated by the commit message "first phase: registered report mode". The second phase of development, or "stage 2 RR dev", was then implemented, building on the initial work. A third phase of RR creation was also added, as described in the commit message "third phase of RR creation". However, some of this work was later reverted, with a commit to "roll back RR overkill", suggesting that some changes were deemed excessive.

4 commit(s) today:

  • cfeac5d [staging] roll back RR overkill — Jamie Cummins
  • 35075aa [staging] third phase of RR creation — Jamie Cummins
  • 6d30479 [staging] stage 2 RR dev — Jamie Cummins
  • 60f395c [staging] first phase: registered report mode — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
